title: APIClient: add searchArticles method
description: Add func searchArticles(q: String, limit: Int = 25, cursor: String? = nil) async throws -> PaginatedResponse<Article> to AggregatorApp/Common/APIClient.swift near the existing getArticles method (around line 153). Build the query items array with q, limit, and cursor (cursor only when non-nil). No sort, view, or unread_only params. The method must guard callers — it is a programming error (not a network error) to call it with an empty/whitespace q; add a precondition or guard + throw.
acceptance_criteria: searchArticles emits q and limit query items on every call
cursor query item is included only when a non-nil value is passed
No sort, view, or unread_only items appear in the query
The return type is PaginatedResponse<Article>, decoded by the existing generic get helper
Calling with empty/whitespace q produces an error (not a network request)
